entries.en-US:
---
name: sequencing
description: Sequencing patterns for Remotion - delay, trim, limit duration of items
metadata:
  tags: sequence, series, timing, delay, trim
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: sequencing
description: Remotion 的序列模式 - 延迟、修剪、限制项目持续时间
metadata:
  tags: sequence, series, timing, delay, trim
---

entries.en-US: Use `<Sequence>` to delay when an element appears in the timeline.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `<Sequence>` 来延迟元素在时间轴中的出现。

entries.en-US:
```tsx
import { Sequence } from "remotion";

const {fps} = useVideoConfig();

<Sequence from={1 * fps} durationInFrames={2 * fps} premountFor={1 * fps}>
  <Title />
</Sequence>
<Sequence from={2 * fps} durationInFrames={2 * fps} premountFor={1 * fps}>
  <Subtitle />
</Sequence>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
import { Sequence } from "remotion";

const {fps} = useVideoConfig();

<Sequence from={1 * fps} durationInFrames={2 * fps} premountFor={1 * fps}>
  <Title />
</Sequence>
<Sequence from={2 * fps} durationInFrames={2 * fps} premountFor={1 * fps}>
  <Subtitle />
</Sequence>
```

entries.en-US:
This will by default wrap the component in an absolute fill element.
If the items should not be wrapped, use the `layout` prop:
entries.zh-Hans:
默认情况下，这会将组件包装在一个绝对填充元素中。
如果不应包装项目，请使用 `layout` 属性：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Sequence layout="none">
  <Title />
</Sequence>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Sequence layout="none">
  <Title />
</Sequence>
```

entries.en-US: ## Premounting
entries.zh-Hans: ## 预加载

entries.en-US:
This loads the component in the timeline before it is actually played.
Always premount any `<Sequence>`!
entries.zh-Hans:
这会在组件实际播放之前，将其加载到时间轴中。
始终预加载任何 `<Sequence>`！

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Sequence premountFor={1 * fps}>
  <Title />
</Sequence>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Sequence premountFor={1 * fps}>
  <Title />
</Sequence>
```

entries.en-US: ## Series
entries.zh-Hans: ## 序列

entries.en-US: Use `<Series>` when elements should play one after another without overlap.
entries.zh-Hans: 当元素需要依次播放且不重叠时，使用 `<Series>`。

entries.en-US:
```tsx
import {Series} from 'remotion';

<Series>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={45}>
    <Intro />
  </Series.Sequence>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <MainContent />
  </Series.Sequence>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={30}>
    <Outro />
  </Series.Sequence>
</Series>;
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
import {Series} from 'remotion';

<Series>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={45}>
    <Intro />
  </Series.Sequence>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <MainContent />
  </Series.Sequence>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={30}>
    <Outro />
  </Series.Sequence>
</Series>;
```

entries.en-US: Same as with `<Sequence>`, the items will be wrapped in an absolute fill element by default when using `<Series.Sequence>`, unless the `layout` prop is set to `none`.
entries.zh-Hans: 与 `<Sequence>` 类似，使用 `<Series.Sequence>` 时，项目默认会被包装在绝对填充元素中，除非 `layout` 属性设置为 `none`。

entries.en-US: ### Series with overlaps
entries.zh-Hans: ### 带重叠的序列

entries.en-US: Use negative offset for overlapping sequences:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用负偏移量来实现重叠序列：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Series>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <SceneA />
  </Series.Sequence>
  <Series.Sequence offset={-15} durationInFrames={60}>
    {/* Starts 15 frames before SceneA ends */}
    <SceneB />
  </Series.Sequence>
</Series>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Series>
  <Series.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <SceneA />
  </Series.Sequence>
  <Series.Sequence offset={-15} durationInFrames={60}>
    {/* Starts 15 frames before SceneA ends */}
    <SceneB />
  </Series.Sequence>
</Series>
```

entries.en-US: ## Frame References Inside Sequences
entries.zh-Hans: ## 序列内的帧引用

entries.en-US: Inside a Sequence, `useCurrentFrame()` returns the local frame (starting from 0):
entries.zh-Hans: 在序列内部，`useCurrentFrame()` 返回本地帧（从 0 开始）：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Sequence from={60} durationInFrames={30}>
  <MyComponent />
  {/* Inside MyComponent, useCurrentFrame() returns 0-29, not 60-89 */}
</Sequence>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Sequence from={60} durationInFrames={30}>
  <MyComponent />
  {/* Inside MyComponent, useCurrentFrame() returns 0-29, not 60-89 */}
</Sequence>
```

entries.en-US: ## Nested Sequences
entries.zh-Hans: ## 嵌套序列

entries.en-US: Sequences can be nested for complex timing:
entries.zh-Hans: 可以嵌套序列以实现复杂的时序：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Sequence from={0} durationInFrames={120}>
  <Background />
  <Sequence from={15} durationInFrames={90} layout="none">
    <Title />
  </Sequence>
  <Sequence from={45} durationInFrames={60} layout="none">
    <Subtitle />
  </Sequence>
</Sequence>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Sequence from={0} durationInFrames={120}>
  <Background />
  <Sequence from={15} durationInFrames={90} layout="none">
    <Title />
  </Sequence>
  <Sequence from={45} durationInFrames={60} layout="none">
    <Subtitle />
  </Sequence>
</Sequence>
```
